schema_sql: create table reviews (id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), reviewer_name text not null, review_date date, rating_type text check (rating_type in ('written','rating_only')) not null, text text, seller_response text, notable_tags text[], featured_on_homepage boolean default false, sort_order integer, created_at timestamptz default now());
wiring_instructions: 1. Create the `reviews` table in Supabase using schema_sql above (or map to your CMS's equivalent collection).
2. Import `rows` below as seed data — one row per review, preserving reviewer_name/review_date order (most recent first).

3. On the homepage, the reviews-grid queries `select * from reviews where featured_on_homepage = true order by sort_order asc limit 6` — exactly the 6 currently hardcoded in ui_kits/website/index.html's `reviews` JS array. Swapping the hardcoded array for this query is the only change needed to go live.

4. A full reviews page (not yet built) can query all rows ordered by review_date desc, including rating_type = 'rating_only' entries (star-only feedback with no written text) and any seller_response threads.
5. Never fabricate reviews — only rows sourced from the real Facebook Marketplace profile should be added. New reviews should be appended with rating_type set correctly.

rows.text: Jennyfer and her husband are awesome! Wonderful sellers and wonderful people. We live nearby and they even went out of their way to deliver the table so I didn't have to get a U-Haul. Thank you so much!
It was great doing business with Jennyfer. The barcart is exactly as described! She was fast to respond and very friendly.
Very kind and friendly!! Absolutely loved buying from her and I am OBSESSED with the set I got!! I will most likely be back >:)
rows.seller_response: Awe thank you so much for your awesome review ! I'm so glad you love it as much as I do ! Enjoy it !

rows.text: Wonderful, perfect, amazing, and great in every way! MY CHAIRS ARE SO FREAKING CUTE
Great item for a wonderful price and very easy to communicate and pickup
My experience with Jennyfer was great! She was very fair in pricing + negotiation, plus she made the pickup process very easy.
Very poor communicator, never provides full information, did not answer messages, when answering only few Words. Very likely a Scam. DO NOT BUY from her.
rows.seller_response: Hi Aahana, I'm sorry you felt this way. I always try to respond as quickly as possible and provide accurate information for every listing. Many buyers have had positive experiences, as reflected in my other reviews. I wish you the best in finding what you're looking for.

rows.text: Quick to respond and friendly! Product was exactly as described.
rows.seller_response: Thank you Kyle! I'm glad everything worked out and that the piece was exactly what you expected. Enjoy it!
